stories.title: Baby Kevin — July 1956
stories.body: A square-format print stamped JUL • 56 on the margin captures Kevin Paul Wixted at about three months old — born 14 April 1956 in Rochester, NY. He lies swaddled in a patterned blanket in the foreground while two older boys look on: Rod (Rodney Henri Wixted) in a light suit jacket and Bo (Bruce Wixted) in a dark shirt, grinning at the camera. The scene is a Rochester living room with a 1950s television, horizontal blinds, and floral curtains — a flash-lit family moment from the year Matthew Scott Wixted's father was born.

stories.title: Daniel & Kevin — Wedding Day
stories.body: Daniel Scott Wixted (b. 12 Mar 1959, Rochester, NY) and his older brother Kevin Paul Wixted (b. 14 Apr 1956) on Daniel's wedding day, early 1980s. Daniel wears an all-white tuxedo with a floral boutonniere; Kevin stands beside him in a gray-blue tuxedo with bowtie, arm around his brother's shoulder. Both are sons of Bruce John Wixted and Evelyn Ruth Jones — the Rochester Wixted line that later migrated west to Arizona and California. Kevin is Matthew Scott Wixted's father; Daniel is Matthew's uncle.

stories.title: Matthew's Wixted Line — Ireland to California
stories.body: Matthew Scott Wixted (b. 1987, Whittier, CA) descends from the Corning & Rochester, NY Wixteds. His father Kevin Paul Wixted (b. 1956, Rochester) and mother Angela Maxine Amor (b. 1954, Long Beach) raised the California generation. Grandfather Bruce John Wixted (1933–1995) and grandmother Evelyn Ruth Jones (1932–1988), a Rochester librarian, moved the family to Phoenix, AZ in 1963 and Orange County, CA in 1971. The Wixted name in America traces to Thomas James Wixted (1796–1873) and Mary Hogan of Lambeth, London — with earlier Irish roots in Tipperary. Henry Wixted (1823–1893) and Henry Joseph Wixted (1866–1942) appear across Corning censuses for five decades.
